name: Chicken with Plum Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken into 1-inch cubes.
2. In a bowl, mix together wine, catsup, 2 tablespoons plum sauce, salt, and sugar. Add chicken and marinate at least 30 minutes, preferably overnight.
3. Heat wok or skillet over high heat. Add oil.
4. Stir-fry chicken until almost cooked, about 1 minute.
5. Add chicken broth and remaining 1 tablespoon plum sauce. Simmer for 2 to 3 minutes.
6. Blend cornstarch and water mixture and add to pan. Simmer, stirring frequently, until the sauce is thickened and translucent.
